title: Jedi
content: The Jedi (), Jedi Knights, or the Knights of the Jedi Order are the main protagonists of many works of the "Star Wars" franchise, often working symbiotically alongside the Galactic Republic and the Rebel Alliance. The Jedi Order are depicted as a monastic, academic, and meritocratic organization whose origin dates back thousands of years before the events of the first film released in the franchise. The fictional organization has inspired a real-world new religious movement, Jediism. The Jedi Order were powerful Force -wielding beings, guardians of peace and justice in the "Star Wars" galaxy.
